updates.tweet_text:

65 next zone of interest. Selloff happens below https://t.co/S8sucEvEEV

updates.tweet_text:
Very low volatility remains in #ES_F as we fill out the new range. As posted, the range is 7565 to 7604, with 7585 being a magnet in the middle. 2hrs ago we swept 7585, recovered, then pinned there. 7604 was next up, here now.

7620 if this can clear. 7585, 7565 remain supports https://t.co/S8sucEvEEV
updates.notes: 7604 named as 'next up' resistance and 7620 explicitly flagged as next target 'if this can clear' — both new actionable levels not in morning plan.

updates.tweet_text:
There's the tap of 7604 and we've been here for hours in #ES_F. The regime now is that we get brief bursts of volatility which need to be capitalized on as we chop for days after. 7604-7565=the range with 7585 magnet. We swept 7585, rallied to 7604 target

7616, 7620-24 next https://t.co/rbW6jR5ulj
updates.notes: 7616 and 7620-24 (mid ~7622) named explicitly as 'next' resistance targets — new levels not in morning plan. 7604/7585/7565 are reaffirmations.

updates.tweet_text: @ES_Money_Print @chrisAn00930062 Yes. We set a very clear significant low at 7585 at the open last night. This was a 40 point low making at an A+ Failed Breakdown by my criteria.

updates.tweet_text:
We got our little volatility burst in #ES_F this morning & its back into rally/chop regime again. 7565-7604 was the range given with 7585 magnet. We swept 7585 as posted this morning, recovered. Targets then became 7604 (hit), 7616 (hit), 7620-24 (hit).

7631, 7642, 7655 next https://t.co/N9B6HZdY3A
updates.notes: 7631 and 7642 are newly named upside targets not in morning plan. 7655 is already in morning plan. 7604/7616/7620-24 are hindsight observations.

updates.tweet_text: @chrisAn00930062 @ES_Money_Print Its extremely clear. I wrote the newsletter Friday at 4pm. At this point 7585 was just a normal unactionable support. On Sunday at 6pm we held it and set a very clear *significant low*. This is the primary criteria for a Failed Breakdown. We swept that low this AM and recovered.
updates.notes: 7585 is in morning plan; tweet is hindsight explanation of FBD criteria already triggered, not a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @chrisAn00930062 @ES_Money_Print At 7585 at 6pm Sunday we set a low and rallied to 7620. That would meet criteria 1 (being the Sunday daily low) and 2. That makes it an A+ Failed Breakdown https://t.co/IDURhbdXo5
updates.notes: 7585 and 7620 are both in morning plan; tweet is a hindsight explanation of past price action criteria, not a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @KnightTrader999 @chrisAn00930062 @ES_Money_Print 7604 was the simply the first available entry up when I was posting. The high quality entries and zones are always in the newsletter, I don'tgenerally include newsletter entries here on Twitter (newsletter readers pay for those). I'll include lower quality reclaims here though
updates.notes: Conversational reply explaining tweet vs newsletter content. 7604 is mentioned as a past entry reference, not named as a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: We got our 20 minutes of volatility burst this morning and as always, it setup a Failed Breakdown of 7585 (Sunday opening low) then probably days of grind again. 7605 now support. Newsletter out soon with next entries from here
updates.notes: 7605 explicitly named as 'now support' — actionable new level not in morning plan.

updates.tweet_text:
